site: AI Friendly Blog
base_url: https://leechingfon.netlify.app
language: zh-Hant

description: HTML-first technical blog powered by Astro with Decap editorial workflow.

entrypoints:
- https://leechingfon.netlify.app/
- https://leechingfon.netlify.app/sitemap-index.xml
- https://leechingfon.netlify.app/rss.xml
- https://leechingfon.netlify.app/atom.xml

policies:
- Draft content is not part of production indexes.
- Content images use Cloudinary URLs only.
